The '''''Lastri's Ort''''' was one of the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operation. It was a 300 meter long [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Star Galleon-class frigate|''Star Galleon''-class frigate]], and as such was the largest and best-armed [[Starship/Legends|ship]] in Karrde's [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].

The ship was sold to Karrde by an unidentified former [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who needed to raise additional money, and the only alteration made to the ship was to remove its [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] barracks for additional cargo space.

Karrde usually operated ''Lastri's Ort'' in [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Star system/Legends|systems]] that were far from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] territory, as Imperial patrols might be suspicious of such a ship in private hands. However, in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], Karrde risked taking the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] to the [[Bilbringi Shipyards]] as part of his operation to steal a [[crystal gravfield trap]]. Along with the rest of the [[Smugglers' Alliance]], it played an important role in the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
"''Lastri's Ort''" may be a pun on the term "last resort." This would be in line with Talon Karrde's habit of naming his starships with puns.

During ''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'', Karrde and [[Aves]] mentioned that Karrde was turning over command of a ship named the ''Last Resort'' to Aves. It is not clear whether the ship mentioned was, in fact, ''Lastri's Ort'' or another ship actually named ''Last Resort''.
